title: DN3 1ET, Thorpe Marsh Green Energy Hub Limited: environmental permit issued EPR/CP3091SC/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Thorpe Marsh Green Energy Hub Limited   Installation name: Thorpe Marsh Landfill   Permit number: EPR/CP3091SC   "
